title: Weekly SAP AI Digest — Week of March 13, 2026
summary: This week in SAP AI: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here, Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners, SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market and more. Full roundup of Joule, AI Core, Generative AI Hub, and SAP Business AI updates.

title: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here: Building the Foundation for Intelligent Procurement
summary: SAP Ariba has launched its next-generation platform, leveraging AI for intelligent procurement. This update aims to revolutionize the source-to-pay process.

title: Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners
summary: SAP announces the 2026 Partner Awards, recognizing top-performing partners. Global winners are chosen for their excellence in helping customers achieve their goals.

title: SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market
summary: SAP launches Distributed Energy Resources to unlock value in energy flexibility market through data orchestration. This enables utilities to better manage and utilize distributed energy resources.

title: Strengthening Customer Experience Across the Lead-to-Cash Journey
summary: Companies are integrating customer experience and operational precision to improve the lead-to-cash journey. This matters because seamless experiences drive customer loyalty and revenue growth.
